CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS HELD ON NOV-19-2015. PARTIES HAVE INFORMED THE COURT OF THEIR SETTLEMENT. MATTER IS SET FOR FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JAN-04-2016 AT 9:00 AM IN 304 TO ALLOW TIME FOR FILING OF A DISMISSAL. THE NEXT DATE SHALL GO OFF CALENDAR WHEN A DISMISSAL HAS BEEN FILED. JUDGE CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK DANIAL LEMIRE, NOT REPORTED.
